features.name: positive-edge DFF with formal clock gating assumption
features.description: Code should include a positive-edge-triggered D flip-flop ($_DFF_P_ cell) whose clock is constrained to remain constant via an assume property, and an assertion that the flop output retains its value across time steps without a clock edge

features.name: undef propagation through DFF without clock toggle
features.description: Code should include a D flip-flop where the data input transitions from a defined value to undef (x) while the clock is held constant, verifying that the output does not change to undef in the absence of a clock edge

features.name: icells instantiation of internal DFF primitive
features.description: Code should include read_verilog with -icells flag to instantiate internal Yosys cell primitives like $_DFF_P_ directly in SystemVerilog source, enabling white-box testing of internal cells

features.name: SAT verification with undef enabled and sequential depth
features.description: Code should include SAT-based formal verification using -enable_undef -seq 2 -verify -prove-asserts flags, exercising multi-step sequential analysis with undef states to detect incorrect state transitions
